Handyverse Developer Documentation

Handy is best in class male sex masturbator. It works well on its own, but we as a company have focused on the platform Handy connects to.
This documentation covers the Handyverse platform. TheThe Handy masturbator is currently the only HW on the platform, but this will change over the next period as we invite other HW producers and our new products to the platform.
👋
Welcome! This is the developer documentation for the Handyverse platform. It is bridging fantasy and reality by connecting sex toys to online content.
Questions? Here’s how to reach us:
Discord: handy_lars (developer) | handyAlexander (CTO)
Email: lars@ohdoki.com (developer) | alexander@ohdoki.com (CTO)
